allow: Bash(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-decision-log "{\\"decision\\":\\"Eng review \(FULL_REVIEW\): 8 findings, all resolved\\",\\"rationale\\":\\"Coordinator SPOF fixed with readiness gate + bus-factor protocol; SLA defined in routing protocol; quality formula consolidated; trust-transfer test added; geography expansion deferred to Year 2\\",\\"scope\\":\\"branch\\",\\"source\\":\\"skill\\",\\"confidence\\":8}")

Bash(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-learnings-log '{"skill":"plan-eng-review","type":"operational","key":"coordinator-spof-pattern","insight":"When a plan moves founder SPOF to coordinator, it must also define coordinator bus-factor mitigations and a readiness gate before handoff. The SPOF is transferred, not eliminated.","confidence":9,"source":"observed","files":["~/.gstack/projects/medbyclick/vadimrudkovsky-unknown-design-20260616-194257.md"]}')

Bash(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-learnings-log '{"skill":"plan-eng-review","type":"operational","key":"trust-transfer-test","insight":"Plans that assume personal founder trust transfers to a company brand should include an explicit test in Phase 1 before marketing spend: one case where the new entity \(not founder\) is the primary contact. No test = unproven assumption.","confidence":9,"source":"cross-model","files":["~/.gstack/projects/medbyclick/vadimrudkovsky-unknown-design-20260616-194257.md"]}')

Bash(~/.claude/skills/gstack/bin/gstack-learnings-log '{"skill":"plan-eng-review","type":"operational","key":"geography-expansion-year1","insight":"Geography expansion in Year 1 of a services business is almost always premature: new jurisdiction = new operation. Cut from 12-month plan; put in Year 2 planning.","confidence":8,"source":"cross-model","files":["~/.gstack/projects/medbyclick/vadimrudkovsky-unknown-design-20260616-194257.md"]}')
